content.en:
Ye Tian directly refined a Nightmare Rama Flower, and with the help of this Nightmare Rama Flower, he perfected the incomplete Extreme Ultimate Arcane - the Blade of the Remnant Demon!

After all, he had already cultivated the Ultimate Rule Realm to the Perfection Realm, and there was no need to continue to comprehend the Ultimate Rule Realm.

As for the form secret method, it is useless to just comprehend, and you have to use some resources to improve it, so it is not suitable for comprehension.

And the Demon Blade can be perfected, once it is perfected, his strength will skyrocket, and he naturally wants to improve it~ The Demon Blade!

Therefore, Ye Tian used the Nightmare Rama Flower to perfect the Demon Blade.

Time flies, Ye Tian's perception and understanding of the Demon Blade are getting deeper and deeper, and many flaws are modified by him one by one, and then more and more perfect.

However, even a Nightmare Rama Flower wouldn't necessarily allow him to perfect a truly complete Extreme Path Ultimate Arcane.

Really.

After a period of time, the Nightmare Rama Flower ran out of energy, and Ye Tian still hadn't completely perfected the Demon Blade after all, this Broken Extreme Path Ultimate Arcane was only 90% perfected, and the last 10% was still not perfected.

But even so, the attack power of the Demon Blade is far greater than before, and the side effects are much less.

Now, he can easily cast the Demon Blade, and the cost of flesh retaliation is very low.

Of course, he naturally wanted to perfect the truly complete Demon Blade.

So, Ye Tian ate the second Nightmare Rama flower.

Soon, with the help of the second Nightmare Rama Flower, Ye Tian succeeded in creating a truly complete Demon Blade, and there was still time to comprehend other things.

And just when he created the complete Demon Remnant Blade, a Demon Remnant Blade mark appeared in Ye Tian's body, as if the Demon Remnant Blade was engraved in his body.

It seems to be transcendent and eternal, and no power seems to be worth mentioning in front of it.

This is the true Extreme Ultimate Arcane!

"The real Extreme Ultimate Arcane, the energy consumption only needs one-tenth, but the power is multiplied, with my current strength, there is hope for killing gold and destroying ancient demons!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Of course, he didn't dare to kill the Golden Annihilation Ancient Demon, if he dared to kill the Golden Annihilation Ancient Demon in the abyss of Aluo Mu, he would definitely not be able to hide from Aluo Mu's main department.

Once he violates the main department of the Arrow Mother, even if he is a peak ancient demon-level powerhouse, the consequences will be extremely serious, and he will even be wiped out.

After all, the main department of the Arrow Mother didn't want to see an ancient demon-level powerhouse violate its rules, even if he was evil.

Therefore, even if he could kill the Golden Destroying Ancient Demon, he couldn't kill it.

If he could kill him, when he was still weak, the Golden Slayer Ancient Demon could have attacked him, but he didn't dare.

Unless he enters a place like the Realm of Destruction one day later, he will dare to deal with the Golden Annihilation Ancient Demon.

But at that time, the Golden Slayer Ancient Demon must not dare to go in.

......

Taking advantage of the fact that there was still a lot of energy in the Nightmare Rama Flower, he immediately began to create the sixth form of various forms of secret methods.

Many of the form secret methods created by ordinary peak ancient demon-level powerhouses only have four forms, some have five forms, and the limit is six forms.

For example, the peak ancient demon-level powerhouse of the Stygian Ancient Demon is the sixth form.

Therefore, Ye Tian could only create the sixth form of various forms of secret methods, and this was the limit.

Soon, the sixth form of the Mystic Form of Ten Thousand Methods was created by Ye Tian, and then the sixth form of the Arrow Golden Body Form Mystic Method.

After that, there is the sixth form of the Arm of Arrow form secret method, and the sixth form of the space-time form secret method.

After creating these sixth forms, the energy of the Nightmare Rama Flower was completely depleted.

"Hahaha, the two Nightmare Rama flowers have helped me so much that they have saved me countless years of penance. "

Ye Tian was very excited.

However, he also scrapped two replica bodies, but this loss was nothing at all.

In the years that followed, Ye Tian also specially let a copy body comprehend the replication talent ball, which is also the most important thing, if he can completely comprehend the replication talent ball, it will be of great help to him.

"If you can still get the Nightmare Rama Flower next time, take the opportunity to comprehend the Replication Talent Orb, but the difficulty of the Replication Talent Ball is even more difficult than the ultimate arcane of the Extreme Path created by yourself, and it is impossible for the two Nightmare Rama Flowers to completely comprehend the Replication Talent Ball. "

Ye Tian knew this, so he didn't waste the Nightmare Rama Flower, otherwise he used the Nightmare Rama Flower, but he didn't understand the copy talent ball, and his strength didn't improve, which was equivalent to wasting it in vain.

Therefore, he did not rush to use the Nightmare Rama Flower, but to perfect the Demon Blade and create the sixth form of various forms of secret methods, which was the most cost-effective.

Time flies.

Long years have passed.

Ye Tian used a lot of resources to improve his cultivation, and now his cultivation has reached the mid-stage level of a top ancient demon-level powerhouse, and he is not very far from the late stage.

It can be said that with his current strength, as long as he doesn't provoke the few peak ancient demon-level powerhouses and the ultimate ancient demons in the main department of Ah Luo's mother, he can almost go sideways.

Of course.

Ye Tian would not provoke these strong people, after all, there was no point of conflict.

He is very low-key, and he doesn't want to cause trouble now, anyway, when this era is over, he can return to his era.

Or, if he commits suicide, he can go back.

He just wants to stay in this era for a long time, improve his strength more, master more knowledge, and only after he goes back can he quickly improve.

He also knew very well that no matter how low-key he was, something big must have happened in this era, otherwise there would not have been so many space-time bubbles shattered, so many ancient demon-level powerhouses would fall, the ultimate ancient demons would be asleep, and the era would be over.

This must have happened to a very terrifying thing, and even the ultimate ancient demon could not avoid the catastrophe.

He wondered what was going on.

......

Arrow's main department.

this day.

Several Ultimate Ancient Demons gathered together, and everyone was a little excited.

"Aromu, are you sure you've traveled through the endless space-time line, seen a broken space-time bubble, and sensed a lot of unknown things?"

Aloye Gumo asked.

The Alomu Ancient Demon nodded, "Yes, it's indeed a shattered space-time bubble, but the rules there seem to have been modified, and I can't enter it." But what is certain is that there are many good things in the fragments of the space-time bubble, and perhaps dangers. "

"Then you have to let the peak ancient demon-level powerhouses enter, maybe there will be a big gain. The Ancient Demon of the Underworld said for a long time.
